nasb.text: So Moses spoke thus to the sons of Israel, but they did not listen to Moses on account of their despondency and cruel bondage.

esv.text: Moses spoke thus to the people of Israel, but they did not listen to Moses, because of their broken spirit and harsh slavery.

cnv.text: 摩西這樣告訴以色列人，只是他們因為心裡愁煩和苦工的緣故，就不肯聽摩西的話。

ccb.text: 摩西把这番话转告百姓，可是他们因为残酷的劳役无比沮丧，不肯听他的话。
